title: coleus nepetifolius
intro: Coleus nepetifolius, also known as Coleus fragrans, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Coleus nepetifolius can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its potential therapeutic properties.
